merge_dimensions.trigger_entry: 在顺势背景中等待 H1/H2/L1/L2 或 second-entry 触发，再用 buy/sell stop 跟进。
merge_dimensions.invalidation_stop: 后续 follow-through 很差; 出现 bull trap / bear trap 或关键低点/高点被反向突破
merge_dimensions.management: 把 broad channel 误当 tight trend; 在 MM 附近或 climax 后继续追价

merge_dimensions.trigger_entry: 确认 breakout 后的 good follow-through，再用 market/stop order 顺势跟进。
merge_dimensions.invalidation_stop: breakout 后 follow-through 很差; 出现 deep pullback 或 gap 被迅速回补
merge_dimensions.management: TR 内追 breakout 被 80-20 假突破打回; 把 weak breakout 误判成 strong breakout

merge_dimensions.trigger_entry: 在区间边缘或第二段 trap 明确失败后，等反转 signal 再逆势进场。
merge_dimensions.invalidation_stop: breakout 重新得到连续 follow-through; 区间结构被 surprise bar 直接改写
merge_dimensions.management: 把 broad channel continuation 误当 range reversal; 在强 breakout 中过早逆势

reason: Candidates are only merged when they share the same theme family and differ by source/example rather than executable semantics.
evidence_summary: Cross-source families were kept distinct when trigger / invalidation or management semantics diverged.
